channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Eye Opener: Severe weather brings flooding, violent storms to Midwest
item.description: Extreme weather in the Midwest brings severe flooding and dangerous winds to parts of the region. Plus, the suspect in the White House Correspondents'...

item.title: Austrian pleads guilty to plotting terror attack on Taylor Swift concert
item.description: Beran A. was arrested after a tip from U.S. intelligence services just before the first of Swift's three planned Vienna concerts in August 2024 .

item.title: Adopted and Locked Away: Kids promised ‘forever homes’ instead confined in for-profit institutions
item.description: An Associated Press investigation finds that a business known for tough-love boarding schools for rebellious, rich teenagers has set its sights on a d...

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel defends himself after Donald and Melania Trump call for his firing
item.description: Jimmy Kimmel has responded to Donald and Melania Trump calling for ABC to fire him after a joke he made days before the White House Correspondents' Di...
